title: तर्कसङ्ग्रहः
author: अन्नम्भट्टः (Annambhatta)
description: A classic introductory primer to the Nyaya-Vaisheshika systems of Indian philosophy, written in the 17th century.

title: कारिकावली / मुक्तावली
author: विश्वनाथपञ्चाननभट्टाचार्यः (Vishvanatha)
description: An advanced Sanskrit compendium on Nyaya theory, expanding on Padartha categories and logic.
